title: Wrapped Up
description: Behold, a beefy vanilla plus modpack with the focus of being as cozy as possible.
body:
# Vanilla plus, full worlds, and super cozy gameplay. What more could you want?

   As of version 1.3.1 this modpack is almost entirely vanilla plus. Lots of ease of use and life improvements. Adding the lost contestants of past mob votes for those still mourning their loss, building blocks for the coziest of creations, and... snails? Yeah, snails.

### What to expect

-    Spawn in large villages generated by ChoiceTheorem
-    Explore the vast landscape with Xaeros maps and Small Ships by Talhanation 
-    Adore the beautiful graphics and improved preformance 
-    Build fantastic homes with Handcrafted by Codex Adrian
-    Expand your inventory with Scout by Cynosphere and Inmis by Draylar
-    Crawl (by Fewizz) through dungeons by NovaWostra and YUNGNICKYOUNG
-    PLay with your friends with the Essential mod by Spark Universe (may work better for some than others)
-    and live a very cozy... Wrapped Up life!

     Go check out their amazing mods!

### Round of Aplause for Modrinth
